message:
test(bd-2ed4): add 15 unit tests for transform.rs

Cover NotSet clone/copy/default, ArgTransform defaults and Default
trait, schema transforms (type override, default value, rename
updates required, hide removes from required), combined transforms,
build_definition preserving parent metadata, non-object schema
passthrough, minimal schema property/required injection, hidden
defaults injection via call, no-op and nonexistent arg transforms.
Server test count: 1113.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
